series_metadata.series_title: Faxes Form the Solid Transplant Consortium
series_metadata.series_description: Faxes from the Solid Transplant Consortium are received by staff physicians for their review and consideration. Faxes include patient information and transplant options. Decisions and recommendations are telephoned back to the Consortium.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: faxes in Director's office, and and 9 months in confidential storage
